zh.lifeSummary: Lucy Trevelyan於1398年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 維普。她於大約1424年與Thomas Trevelyan在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1481年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 維普享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Trevelyan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Trevelyan in Saint Veep (Cornwall).

variants.name: Trevillian
meanings: Cornish: variant of Trevelyan, a habitational name from Trevelyan in Saint Veep (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre(f) ‘estate, farmstead’ + either an unrecorded Old Cornish personal name equivalent either to Old Breton Ilian or the recorded Old Cornish Milian, with mutation of m to v. This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland. Compare Trovillion .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lucy Trevelyan was born in 1398, in St Veep, Cornwall, England. She married Thomas Trevelyan about 1424, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1481, in St Veep, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lucy Trevelyan est née en 1398, à St Veep, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Trevelyan environ 1424, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1481, à St Veep, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Trevelyan(은)는 1398년 영국 코른월 스트 브이프에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Thomas Trevelyan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 브이프에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lucy Trevelyan родилась в 1398 г. в местности ст вип, корнвалл, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Trevelyan около 1424 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1481 г. в местности ст вип, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.
